title: neobartsia camporum
intro: Neobartsia camporum is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the bartsia, a type of hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. The medicinal properties of Neobartsia camporum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neobartsia camporum are said to include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water, or as a tincture by macerating the plant material in a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
